scores.correctness_notes: Covers single-base and multi-arch builds correctly, mentions deprecated bases key, but critically misses the multi-base build pattern (embedding base in platform key like ubuntu@22.04:amd64) which is a key part of the gold standard. Also omits almalinux@9 support, armhf/ppc64el/s390x architectures, and the architecture-independent 'all' platform.
scores.hallucination_notes: The arm64 example showing build-on: [amd64, arm64] for arm64 cross-compilation is not in the gold standard and may be an extrapolation. The statement about bases only being accepted for bases 'supported before 2024-01-01' appears to be a fabricated specific claim not in the gold standard.
